exploration_notes: The API server authentication implementation centers on `pkg/kubeapiserver/authenticator/config.go` which contains `Config.New()` — the authenticator chain constructor. It builds a union chain (via `request/union/union.go`) of: (1) x509 client certificate authenticator (`request/x509/x509.go`), (2) bearer token authenticator (`request/bearertoken/bearertoken.go`) wrapping a token union of service account authenticators (`pkg/serviceaccount/jwt.go` for JWT validation, `claims.go` for bound token
